/usr/local/RemoteDevelopmentToolkit/bin/cmake -E rm -f CMakeFiles/zlib.dir/objects.a
/opt/homebrew/bin/x86_64-w64-mingw32-ar qc CMakeFiles/zlib.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles/zlib.dir/objects1.rsp
/opt/homebrew/bin/x86_64-w64-mingw32-gcc -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -o libzlib.dll -Wl,--out-implib,libzlib.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,1,--minor-image-version,3 -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles/zlib.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive @CMakeFiles/zlib.dir/linkLibs.rsp
